peds.title: Pediatric AUC-Guided Vancomycin

notes.maxDaily: Do not exceed 80 mg/kg/day without specialist advice.

peds.disclaimer: For educational use; verify dosing with institutional policy. AUC target 400–600 for MIC=1 unless otherwise specified by your site.

neo.title: Neonate AUC-Guided Vancomycin

notes.monitor: Frequent reassessment of renal function and measured levels is recommended in neonates.

neo.disclaimer: Model-based dosing with PMA/PNA; institutional NICU policies may differ. Verify before clinical use.

methods.title: Choosing a method
methods.deterministic: Deterministic (population PK) for initial estimates (AUC target 400–600 at MIC 1).
methods.levels: Levels/EoIP method when 1–2 measured levels available; adjusts patient-specific k/CL.
methods.bayesian: Bayesian when service online; best with ≥1 level.

geriatrics.title: Geriatrics (≥65y)
geriatrics.bullet1: Avoid routine SCr rounding; monitor trends; consider longer intervals (q12–24h) with reduced CL.

weight.title: Weight
weight.bullet1: BMI≥30: use AdjBW for CrCl; Vd often larger — consider vdPerKg 0.7–0.9 and loading 20–25 mg/kg (rounded to 250 mg).
weight.bullet2: Underweight: IBW or TBW if TBW<IBW; consider vdPerKg 0.6–0.7.
